title: CutiePack
description: Small fantasy modpack focused on exploring dark magic and forbidden arcana.
body:
# CutiePack
This is a fantasy rpg modpack focused on "forbidden magic" themed mods. You will sacrfice animals, summon demons and create spells to fight bosses and upgrade your character.

## Mod Highlights
### Blood Magic
![Dark room with blood altar in the middle. Behind it are alchemy table and sacrficial lamb](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e0fd35157961a70f20bad71a32c3c49cd5b1deaf.jpeg)
Sacrfice animal (or your own) blood to improve your blood magic potential

### Occultism
![simple room with lectern and absolutely adorable mini-cthulhu <3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3b7827937189bb2454699575e9cdcdd3cf24d3d0.jpeg)
Use demon magic to cast spells. You can also summon said demons to make them do your bidding

### Biomancy 2
![Meaty room with primordial cradle and a flesh blob. ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f3a704dab7b79a1c06fee182fadf36d8def5b52.jpeg)
If magic is not your suit you might try to build automated factories created from flesh and bones
### Additionally
- Create for simple automation
- Mystical Agriculture to make useful resources grow by themselves
- Ars Noveau to create your own spells
- Apotheosis for expanded enchanting mechanic (adventure module turned off by default)
- [Cosmetic Armor Reworked](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cosmetic-armor-reworked)
- And much more!

I'll expand on this modpack in near future, maybe adding custom quests, recipes and more rpg elements. For now it's just a small collection of mods I found fun :b.

May the force be with you!
